query:
SELECT c.id, l.nome as cliente, c.valorVenda, c.createdAt 
FROM contratos c 
JOIN leads l ON c.leadId = l.id
ORDER BY c.createdAt ASC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute
